description: Legal document in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (active 1100–1138 CE). Draft. In the crossed out portion: "our master the Nezer (=Natan b. Shemuel, fl. 1128–1164) came in to him. . . . concerning the testator. . . ." In the next line: "You know that we are not warrāqīn. . . . (Information in part from CUDL) Join: Alan Elbaum.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
